name: Smoked Eel Pâté
intro:
Eel is one of those rather unloved fish. I suppose it looks a bit unattractive (but how beautiful is octopus?). I think it’s more that weusually do not know what to do with it.

This is a delicious way to prepare eel. It has a rich, rather fatty fleshes that is perfect for pâté. Smoking enhances the flavour and thelemon juice adds a delicious sharpness. This is one of the great fish pâtés.
method: Skin the eel and remove the backbone. Place the flesh, broken into pie pieces, in a food processor with the butter, lemon juice and onion. Process until it becomes a smooth mousse. Taste and season with sal salt and pepper, then refrigerate until needed.
You can buy eel at fish markets. It is usually sold vacuum-packed.
